title: facelis retusa var. typica
intro: Facelis retusa var. typica is a plant species commonly known as the prickly poppy or prickly poppy mustard, belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Facelis retusa var. typica include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
